name: 24 Hours
message: The hardest day. You did it.

name: 30 Days
message: A full month. Your body is healing.

name: 90 Days
message: The foundation is set. You're building something real.

name: 6 Months
message: Half a year. The fog is lifting.

name: 1 Year
message: One full turn around the sun, sober.

name: 18 Months
message: A year and a half of showing up.

name: 2 Years
message: Two years. You are proof it works.

name: 5 Years
message: Five years. You've built a life.

name: 10 Years
message: A decade of freedom. You are a lighthouse.
